scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p ../../dist/assets && cp -R assets/. ../../dist/assets/ && for deck in ai-knowledge-breakthrough micro-frontend type-driven-development; do mkdir -p ../../dist/$deck/assets && cp -R assets/$deck ../../dist/$deck/assets/; done
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && slidev build ai-knowledge-breakthrough/ai-knowledge-breakthrough.md micro-frontend/micro-frontend.md type-driven-development/type-driven-development.md --out $PWD/../../dist --base ./ --download=false && pnpm run copy-assets && pnpm run index
